test_results.question: Count all doctors.
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_doctors FROM doctors;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE appointment_date >= '2021-01-01' AND appointment_date < '2021-02-01';

test_results.question: Show prescription count per medication.
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT pr.medication_name, COUNT(*) AS total_prescriptions FROM prescriptions pr GROUP BY pr.medication_name ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT p.first_name, COUNT(pr.prescription_id) AS prescription_count FROM prescriptions pr JOIN patients p ON pr.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.first_name ORDER BY prescription_count DESC;

test_results.question: Which medications are most used in Neurology?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT pr.medication_name, COUNT(*) AS total_prescriptions FROM prescriptions pr JOIN appointments a ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Neurology' GROUP BY pr.medication_name ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT medication_name, COUNT(prescription_id) AS prescriptions_count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY medication_name HAVING prescriptions_count > 1 ORDER BY prescriptions_count DESC;

test_results.question: Which medication is prescribed most often?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT pr.medication_name, COUNT(*) AS total FROM prescriptions pr GROUP BY pr.medication_name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT medication_name FROM prescriptions WHERE appointment_id = (SELECT appointment_id FROM appointments WHERE department_id = 1 AND status = 'Active') ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

test_results.question: How many physicians are registered?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_doctors FROM doctors;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_physicians FROM physicians;

test_results.question: How many distinct patients does each doctor have?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.patient_id) AS distinct_patients FROM doctors d JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id GROUP BY d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name ORDER BY distinct_patients DESC;

test_results.question: Total number of departments?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_departments FROM departments;

test_results.question: Which appointments were cancelled?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT a.appointment_id, a.appointment_date, a.reason FROM appointments a WHERE a.status = 'cancelled' ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT a.appointment_date, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS appointment_count FROM appointments a WHERE a.status = 'cancelled' GROUP BY a.appointment_date ORDER BY appointment_date DESC;

test_results.question: Which patients are male?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name FROM patients p WHERE p.gender = 'M' ORDER BY p.last_name;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name FROM patients p WHERE p.gender = 'M' ORDER BY p.first_name;

test_results.question: Which patients live in Liege?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name FROM patients p WHERE p.city = 'Liege' ORDER BY p.last_name;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, d.specialty FROM patients p JOIN doctors d ON p.department_id = d.department_id WHERE d.department_id = 1 ORDER BY p.first_name;

test_results.question: Which medications were prescribed?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT pr.medication_name FROM prescriptions pr ORDER BY pr.medication_name;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT medication_name FROM prescriptions WHERE appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND department_id = dep.department_id ORDER BY medication_name;

test_results.question: Total patients registered?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patients;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patients;

test_results.question: Give me the doctor count.
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_doctors FROM doctors;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS doctor_count FROM doctors WHERE department_id = 1;

test_results.question: What are the 5 most recent appointments?
test_results.expected_sql: SELECT a.appointment_date, p.first_name, p.last_name, a.reason FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC LIMIT 5;
test_results.generated_sql: SELECT a.appointment_date, a.reason, a.diagnosis, p.first_name, p.last_name, d.department_name FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id JOIN departments d ON a.department_id = d.department_id WHERE a.status = 'Completed' ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC LIMIT 5;
